title: Warm Welcome & Greeting
body:
Hello, 

Thank you for reaching out to us. We hope you’re doing well. We truly appreciate you contacting our support team. Please let us know how we can assist you today, and we’ll be more than happy to help. 

Looking forward to your message. 

Best regards, 
AppDevs Support Team

title: Request for Installation Credentials
body:
Hello, 
 To investigate and resolve your issue effectively, 
 we kindly request you to provide the following credentials for installation on your server. 
 Purchase Information: Purchase Code, Product Key, Project Domain. 
 Server Access:
 - Login URL,
 - Email,
 - Password. 
 Database Access:
 - Database Name,
 - Database Username,
 - Database Password. 
 Please be assured that all information will be used strictly for troubleshooting and handled securely. 
 We look forward to your response.

title: Refund Not Available but Support Offered
body: Hello, While we are unable to offer a refund, we are fully committed to resolving your issues. Please share your issue list so we can assist you.

title: Request to Update Review
body: Hello, We’re glad your issue has been resolved. If you’re satisfied, we would appreciate it if you could update your review on CodeCanyon.

title: General Feedback Request
body: Hello, If you are satisfied with our product and support, we would greatly appreciate your feedback. Your input helps us improve our service.

title: Contact Sales for Customization
body: Hello, For customization services, please contact our sales team here: https://appdevs.net/sales-support

title: Schedule Customization Meeting
body: Hello, You can schedule a consultation with our team here: https://appdevs.net/consultation to discuss your project requirements.

title: App Store / Play Store Rejection
body: Hello, App approval depends on Google Play and Apple App Store policies. These decisions are beyond our control. Please review their guidelines or contact their support.

title: Purchase Code Requirement
body: Hello, The purchase code is required to verify your license and ensure valid support. Please provide it so we can assist you.

title: Multiple Tickets Warning
body: Hello, We noticed multiple tickets for the same issue. Please continue with a single ticket to ensure faster and clearer communication.

title: Handling Frustrated Client
body: Hello, We understand your frustration and sincerely apologize. Please allow us some time to investigate the issue. We are committed to resolving it for you.

title: Negative Review Response
body: Hello, We’re sorry to hear about your experience. We believe the issue may not be directly related to our system, but we are still here to help. Kindly reconsider your review after resolution.

title: Pirated Script Warning
body: Hello, Using unauthorized or pirated scripts can lead to security risks and service suspension. We strongly recommend using licensed versions for safety and support.

title: Support Scope Limitation
body: Hello, Some requests fall outside our standard support scope. For extended or complex assistance, we recommend using our paid services.

title: Issue Not Related to System
body: Hello, After reviewing your case, the issue does not appear to be related to our system. However, we are happy to guide you if needed.

title: Request for AnyDesk Access
body: Hello, To investigate and resolve your issue effectively, our technical team requires remote access via AnyDesk. Please share your AnyDesk ID and keep your system online so we can assist you.

title: Share Source Code Instead
body: Hello, If you are unable to provide AnyDesk access, you may share your project source code. Please upload it to Google Drive and send us the link for review.

title: Request for Server and Admin Credentials
body: Hello, To properly investigate your issue, please provide your server and admin panel credentials including login URLs, email, and password. This will help us resolve your issue quickly.

title: Data Security Assurance
body: Hello, Please be assured that we do not store any sensitive client data. All credentials are used only for troubleshooting and are handled securely.

title: Request for Issue Details
body: Hello, Please provide a detailed description of the issue you are facing. Screenshots or screen recordings will help us understand the problem better.

title: Request for Full Issue List
body: Hello, Kindly share a complete list of all the issues you are facing. This will help our technical team resolve everything efficiently.

title: Awaiting Your Response
body: Hello, We are waiting for your response to proceed further. Please provide the required information so we can continue assisting you.

title: Issue Under Investigation
body: Hello, Our technical team is currently reviewing your issue. Please allow us some time to investigate. We will update you shortly.

title: Escalated to Technical Team
body: Hello, Your issue has been forwarded to our technical team. They are working on it and we will update you as soon as possible.

title: Delay Due to High Support Volume
body: Hello, We apologize for the delay. Our support team is currently handling a high volume of requests. We appreciate your patience.

title: Delay Due to Holidays
body: Hello, We apologize for the delayed response due to holidays or non-working days. We are now back and will assist you shortly.

title: Support Hours Information
body: Hello, Our support hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:30 PM (GMT+6). Please contact us within this time for faster assistance.

title: Stay Online for Live Support
body: Hello, Our technical team will connect with you shortly. Please stay online and keep your system ready for the session.

title: Network Issue Blocking Support
body: Hello, We are unable to proceed with live support due to a network issue on your side. Please resolve your connection issue and inform us.

title: Friendly Follow-Up
body: Hello, Just following up on your issue. Please let us know if you still need assistance or if everything is working fine.

title: Issue Resolved Confirmation
body: Hello, Your issue has been resolved. Please check on your side and confirm if everything is working properly.

title: Request to Close Ticket
body: Hello, If everything is working properly, may we proceed with closing this ticket? You can always reach out again if needed.

title: Ticket Closed Due to No Response
body: Hello, We have not received a response from you in the last 72 hours. We are closing this ticket for now. Feel free to open a new one anytime.

title: Support Not Available for Modified Code
body: Hello, We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. If the script has been modified with custom code, issues arising from those changes fall outside our support scope. We only provide support for the original, unmodified codebase.

title: Why Modified Code Cannot Be Supported
body: Hello, We understand your effort in customizing the script. However, modified code makes it difficult to investigate issues properly. For this reason, we are unable to support problems caused by custom changes.

title: Use Customization Service for Changes
body: Hello, If you require changes or new features, we recommend using our customization service. This ensures compatibility and allows us to provide proper support. Additional charges will apply.

title: Custom Feature Implementation Option
body: Hello, Thank you for your suggestion. If you need this feature urgently, we can implement it through our customization service. Our team will work specifically on your project. Additional charges will apply.

title: Custom Changes Lost After Update
body: Hello, Please note that updating your system will overwrite previous custom changes. The new version includes a fresh codebase. We recommend keeping a backup before updating.

title: Follow Documentation for Updates
body: Hello, We have provided detailed documentation for the update process. Please follow each step carefully. If needed, you can use our installation service for assistance.

title: Sequential Version Update Required
body: Hello, Please update your system step by step. Skipping versions may cause compatibility issues. Follow the correct upgrade path to avoid errors.

title: App and Web Version Mismatch
body: Hello, Your app and web versions are not aligned. Please ensure both are updated to the same version to avoid unexpected issues.

title: Installation Service Not Included
body: Hello, Installation is not included for free. We provide documentation for self-installation. You may use our paid installation service for a hassle-free setup.

title: Professional Installation Service Offer
body: Hello, We offer a professional installation service including branding setup, server deployment, and app publishing. This ensures a smooth and complete setup experience.

title: Installation Issue Due to Incorrect Steps
body: Hello, The issue appears to be caused by not following the installation steps correctly. Please review the documentation carefully and complete each step properly.

title: Production System Update Limitation
body: Hello, Updating a live system can be complex. For this reason, free support for production updates is limited. We recommend using our paid service for safe updates.

title: Basic Setup Issue
body: Hello, The issue seems related to basic setup steps. Please follow the documentation carefully to resolve it.

title: Recommended for Non-Technical Users
body: Hello, If you are not familiar with technical setup, we recommend using our installation service. Our team will handle everything for you.

title: Update Responsibility Clarification
body: Hello, Updates must be applied by following our documentation. If you face difficulties, we can guide you or provide paid assistance.

title: Custom Gateway Integration Not Supported
body: Hello, If you have modified the system by adding a custom payment gateway on your own and are facing issues, we’re unable to assist in that case. Custom code changes fall outside the scope of our standard support. However, you may share the gateway documentation with us for review, or use our customization service for proper integration.

title: Available Card Issuing Options
body: Hello, We’re sorry for the inconvenience. Please note that multiple card issuing options are already available in the system. You may explore those alternatives and choose the one that best fits your business needs.

title: Strowallet Card Pending Issue
body: Hello, We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. The issue originates from Strowallet’s system, where newly created cards remain in a pending state. Once activated from their side, the card will reflect properly in your system.

title: Waiting for Strowallet Response
body: Hello, Our technical team is currently in contact with Strowallet support regarding this issue. Since it depends on their system, resolution may take some time. We will update you once we receive progress.

title: Strowallet Requires Valid User Data
body: Hello, This issue is related to Strowallet’s verification process. Their system requires valid user data such as ID, email, phone number, and address. Invalid data may cause cards to remain pending.

title: Strowallet Fix in Progress
body: Hello, Our technical team is actively working with Strowallet to resolve this issue. It may take approximately 2–3 working days. We appreciate your patience.

title: Issue Will Be Fixed in Update
body: Hello, This issue will be reviewed by our technical team and, if confirmed, will be resolved in an upcoming version update. You will be able to download it from CodeCanyon.

title: Strowallet Card Details Viewing
body: Hello, After creating a card using Strowallet, users must click the 'Details' button to view full card information. This is how their API is designed to function.

title: Feature Not Included Due to API Differences
body: Hello, This feature is not currently included because different APIs require different implementations. However, we may consider it in future updates or provide it via customization.

title: Payment Gateway Limitation Explained
body: Hello, There are many payment gateways globally, and it is not feasible to include all of them. However, we continue to improve the system based on demand. You may also request custom integration.

title: Strowallet Static Field Requirement
body: Hello, Some fields like country, state, and city are fixed based on Strowallet’s API requirements. Only certain fields like ZIP code can be modified.

title: Stripe Issue - External Limitation
body: Hello, Stripe-related issues are controlled entirely by Stripe’s policies. We recommend contacting their support team directly for proper guidance.

title: Stripe Region Limitation
body: Hello, Stripe currently supports virtual card APIs only in the USA and UK. If you are outside these regions, you may face limitations or rejection.

title: Stripe Alternative Options
body: Hello, You can use alternatives such as Flutterwave, Sudo Africa, Strowallet, or Checkbook instead of Stripe. Additional gateways can be integrated via customization.

title: Refund Request Not Eligible
body: Hello, We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience. However, your request does not meet the conditions of our refund policy, and we are unable to process a refund.

title: Refund Policy Clarification
body: Hello, As per our refund policy, refunds are not applicable for accidental purchases. Please review our policy here: https://appdevs.net/refund-policy
